summary: FQ-09U3 music stingers, ducking, audio settings, and pause behavior - completing the adaptive-music arc (U0-U3) - plus the concurrent Codex art integration, committed together. Remote-control resume after a mid-U3 workstation reset (token exhaustion): the sole remaining failure fq09u3_events_fire_stingers was root-caused and fixed. The director wired the player's attunement_pulsed signal in its _ready, but as a child of Main that runs before game_root assigns its @onready var player, so root.player was null and the connection silently dropped (nightfall fired +1 instead of the expected +2). Fix: _wire_events.call_deferred() runs wiring after the full _ready cascade when the player node is live - one line, in-lane. Suite 256 -> 257. U3 substance: play_stinger fires SFX-bus one-shots over a per-frame Music-bus duck envelope (bed dips under the stinger, music never stops) with per-kind cooldowns; AudioSettings is the single runtime bus-volume authority (Music/SFX buses, profile music_volume/sfx_volume, optional duck_db) with no world-save keys; director process_mode ALWAYS keeps the score and envelope alive under pause; validator requires the five stinger OGGs. The Codex art lane (55 generated PNGs + player_visual/Town-Hall/backdrop wiring, independently verified) shared the dirty tree; three files (smoke_test.gd, validate_repo.py, player.gd) carry hunks from both lanes and could not be split, so the operator chose the combined commit. Not pushed.
scope: FQ-09U3 per docs/WORK_ORDER_FQ_09U_ADAPTIVE_MUSIC.md - stingers, ducking, audio settings, pause, final asset validation; no gameplay/save-schema changes. Co-committed with the separately-authored Codex art integration (art assets + player/Town-Hall/backdrop rendering) that shared the working tree.
next_action: FQ-10: more ores and metallurgy data. Art backlog (player gear overlays, remaining equipment icons, opening cels) via docs/ASSET_ROADMAP.md and docs/HANDOFF_ART_INTEGRATION_2026-07-12.md. Push when the operator instructs.
